scored_papers.title: Modular Variables and the Limits of Phase Detectability in Open Quantum Systems
scored_papers.abstract: Time evolution of Hermitian modular operators for Gaussian wave-packet superpositions under uniform gravitational field, both Schrodinger and Caldeira-Leggett open dynamics. Bohmian local expectation values along trajectories.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 Gaussian wave-packet 重ね合わせの modular 演算子を重力場 + open dynamics で追跡 ✨ wave-packet 形式 × 位相検出と measurement の交点
scored_papers.summary: 📐 重力下の Gaussian wave-packet 重ね合わせで modular 演算子の時間発展。 Caldeira-Leggett 高温極限でも相対位相が modular signal に残存 🌊
